Line 310HTML textMedium
prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,'-') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date
$stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,'-') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 3");
Suggested: <?= __('prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,\'-\') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date') ?>

Line 89HTML textMedium
query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_reads ar INNER JOIN announcements a ON a.id = ar.announcement_id WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date
$totalReadRows = (int)$pdo->query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_reads ar INNER JOIN announcements a ON a.id = ar.announcement_id WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CURDATE())")->fetchColumn();
Suggested: <?= __('query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcement_reads ar INNER JOIN announcements a ON a.id = ar.announcement_id WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date') ?>

Line 257HTML textMedium
prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,'-') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date
$stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,'-') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date <= CURDATE()) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 3");
Suggested: <?= __('prepare("SELECT a.*, COALESCE(u.username,\'-\') AS created_by_name FROM announcements a LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id=a.created_by WHERE (a.start_date IS NULL OR a.start_date') ?>
